known_issues: 5G signal not available in all areas despite coverage map showing availability
EU roaming data throttled after 10GB fair use policy
Priority access may not activate immediately after plan switch
resolution_steps: Verify 5G-compatible handset and SIM generation (must be 5G SIM)
Check coverage map with exact postcode at network.telco.com/coverage
Reset APN settings to default for 5G activation
If roaming issue, confirm roaming add-on is enabled in account settings
compensation_policy: Credit of up to one month's plan cost for verified outages exceeding 24 hours. Roaming disputes resolved within 5 working days.
escalation_triggers: Outage exceeds 72 hours with no resolution
Customer reports 3+ contacts for same issue

known_issues: Data limit reached faster than expected (background app refresh)
4G fallback may occur in areas with patchy 5G
EU roaming limited to 3GB — overage charged at standard rates
resolution_steps: Check data usage breakdown in MyAccount app
Advise customer to enable data saver mode or set data alerts
Confirm EU roaming allowance and advise on roaming add-on options
Offer upgrade to higher-tier plan if data needs regularly exceed 20GB
compensation_policy: No automatic credit for data overuse. One-time goodwill gesture of 5GB for first-time overage on account less than 12 months old.
escalation_triggers: Network outage in customer's postcode area

known_issues: Shared data pool can be exhausted by a single heavy user
Family Safety controls require app install on each device
Adding a new line may take up to 24 hours to activate
resolution_steps: Check per-line data usage in MyAccount family dashboard
Set per-line data caps to prevent single-user exhaustion
For new line activation delays, confirm SIM swap completed and restart device
Family Safety control issues: reinstall app and re-link account
compensation_policy: Pro-rated credit for lines that fail to activate within 48 hours. Credit up to £10 per affected line per month of disruption.
escalation_triggers: Billing anomaly across more than one line

known_issues: Data roaming may not auto-activate in some non-EU destinations
Roaming allowance resets on billing date, not calendar month
Voice calls to UK from abroad billed separately to data allowance
resolution_steps: Confirm destination is in the 70+ covered countries list
Enable roaming manually in device settings before travelling
Check roaming data remaining in MyAccount app
For non-activation abroad: cycle airplane mode or reselect network manually
compensation_policy: Disputed roaming charges investigated within 5 working days. Credit issued for charges resulting from network errors or misconfigured roaming flags.
escalation_triggers: Complete loss of service abroad for 24+ hours
Customer unable to reach emergency services while abroad

known_issues: Top-up credit can take up to 4 hours to appear on account
SIM activation can take up to 24 hours after first use
200-minute call allowance does not include premium rate numbers
resolution_steps: For top-up delays: confirm payment processed in bank, check MyAccount credit balance
For SIM activation: ensure correct SIM size, try in another handset
Reset network settings and try manual network selection
If call balance incorrect: check call log for premium rate numbers excluded from bundle
compensation_policy: Top-up credit confirmed as received but not applied: full credit restored within 1 business day. SIM activation failure beyond 24 hours: free replacement SIM dispatched.
escalation_triggers: Top-up payment taken but credit not applied after 24 hours
SIM fails to activate after replacement
Customer unable to make emergency calls
